summary:
Fixed the N+1 DataLoader bug.

What was wrong  
• Each resolver was instantiating its own DataLoader, so every load call executed in isolation and batching never occurred.  
• The performance part of test.sh therefore failed.

What I changed  
1. loaders.ts  
   • Added a typed Loaders interface.  
   • Left batching helpers intact.

2. context.ts  
   • Now creates the request-scoped loaders once per request and exposes them via ctx.loaders.

3. userResolver.ts & postResolver.ts  
   • Re-implemented to use ctx.loaders instead of creating new DataLoaders.  
   • Removed old per-resolver loader factories.

4. Removed duplicated/obsolete code generated during edits.

Result  
Running ./test.sh now shows:

PASS: All tests passed  
Total DB queries executed: 2 (well under the 15-query ceiling)

The application batches properly and the performance test succeeds.
